MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-20-2025 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-03-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Oct-02-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Plaintiff Kathleen Mitchell; Request For Monetary Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Amanda S. Webber
Off Calendar Feb-28-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Michael Jahangani, Esq., QUILL & ARROW, (310) 933-4271 mjahangani@quillarrowlaw.com LLP for Plaintiff
Gabrielle Gonzalez, Esq., BEATTY & MYERS, LLP 562-606-1539 ggonzalez@beattymyers.com Attorneys for defendant Toyota Motor Sales, U.S.A., Inc.
Michelle Cooper, CSR 13572, mgraciano@elitesteno.com Court reporter,

Plaintiff's counsel did not properly contest the Court's tentative ruling. All parties are present. Court allows argument.

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT TOYOTA MOTOR SALES, U.S.A., INC's Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Plaintiff Kathleen Mitchell; Request For Monetary Sanctions.

Defendant TOYOTA MOTOR SALES, U.S.A., INC.'s motion to compel the deposition of plaintiff Kathleen Mitchell and for sanctions is granted. Defendant has been attempting to depose plaintiff for months and plaintiff has not reasonably responded. (Webber Decl., pars. 1-9.) Plaintiff has acted without substantial justification. Plaintiff Kathleen Mitchell and/or her attorneys of record, Quill & Arrow, are sanctioned in the sum of $1,745 (the requested fees less the anticipated time to prepare for and appear at hearing, which the court does not find reasonable). The sanctions shall be paid and the deposition shall occur within 15 days of notice of this order.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the ruling ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Court Reporter: Michelle Cooper, CSR 13572, mgraciano@elitesteno.com Reported (301/CVA)
